subject: Add FB group: Tango in Poland
body:
User requested adding this FB group to the scrape queue:

**Group:** Tango in Poland
**URL:** https://www.facebook.com/groups/TangoinPoland/
**Region:** Poland (Europe)

Please add to facebook-groups.json config with:
- city: Poland
- state: EU
- timezone: Europe/Warsaw
- priority: 2 (international)
- enabled: true

This extends coverage beyond US to European tango events.

—Harvey
